pageTitle: Image Converter - Free PNG, JPG, WebP Converter | GetNiftyKit
metaDescription: Attach an image and click the format button you want — it converts instantly. Free PNG, JPG, and WebP image converter that runs entirely in your browser, no upload required.
softwareAppDescription: A free image converter that lets you pick exactly the PNG, JPG, or WebP format you need and converts it instantly, right in your browser.
subtitle: Upload an image and click the format you want to convert it instantly
taglineExtra: Pick only the PNG, JPG, or WebP format you need, convert it, and save.
dropzoneText: Drag and drop an image here, or click to choose a file
dropzoneHint: Supports PNG, JPG, WebP, GIF, and more
sameFormatHint: Same format as the original — use this to just resize or re-compress
qualityOptionHint: PNG is lossless, so the quality setting doesn't apply to it
unsupportedFileError: Unsupported file type. Please attach an image file.
decodeErrorText: Couldn't load this image. The file may be corrupted.

faq.q: Can I convert multiple images at once?
faq.a: Yes — you can add several files at once, and choose a different output format for each one individually.

faq.q: Is my image uploaded to a server?
faq.a: No. Everything happens right in your browser — nothing is uploaded or stored on a server.
You can convert to PNG, JPG (JPEG), or WebP.
PNG is lossless, so there's no quality loss. JPG and WebP use light lossy compression, but for everyday use the difference is barely noticeable.

faq.q: Does it just rename the file extension, or actually convert the format?
faq.a: It doesn't just rename the extension — the image is redrawn on a canvas and re-encoded using the real encoding of the format you picked. That's why the file size actually changes before and after conversion.

infoIntroP: The Image Converter is a free tool that converts image files between formats like PNG, JPG, and WebP right in your browser. There's nothing to install and nothing to upload to a server — just add an image, click the format button you want, and download the converted file instantly. It's useful for shrinking image size with WebP for a website, switching a photo to JPG when you don't need transparency, or converting back to lossless PNG for further editing.
infoHowtoP: Drag and drop the image you want to convert, or use the Choose File button to attach it — you can add several files at once. Once a file is added, PNG, JPG, and WebP buttons appear below it; click the format you want and it converts instantly to just that format. When it's done, a Save button appears — click it to download the converted file. Want another format too? Just click a different format button on the same file.
infoUseCases: Converting images to WebP to speed up your website
Converting to whatever format a specific program requires
Switching a photo to JPG to shrink file size when transparency isn't needed
Converting back to lossless PNG for further editing
privacyNote: This tool performs all conversion entirely in your browser. Your images are never uploaded to or stored on a server.
